textByHash.0f40d8861c2256bea4e32666664f73ce3b7d29bd: Yes, like that one! That looks powerful indeed. I think that would do quite nicely.
textByHash.14eaf9153032b160fb52c2dff23ee6da34f42752: It's a rare Zamorakian artifact. I haven't seen any quite like this one before.
textByHash.186a61650fc72a6aaf6dcece563ed83bc46e63e9: If you look closely, you can see that it has a socket where you can place an item to increase its power.
textByHash.1e88b99035f42e5333a343dd5d4e9b8a856f6926: To me? Yes. But maybe not to you.
textByHash.2960f2924b84193fa67c791d9dac8ed6a6383a0d: I'm out here to conduct research, I've been told a giant spider lurks in the heart of the Wilderness.
textByHash.2c2104286f13f87af4546d119790bb6e2eceba61: No, but I have heard tales of the mighty Vet'Ion.
textByHash.341fe188edcf4c6169ea5aac9cc98761f860e33b: Well, would you look at that. Most fascinating.
textByHash.3e392dcf7b68bf80a45ec662a3c6fb48caeb907c: Venenatis is the last of her kind. Lots of giant spiders used to dwell deep in the mountains until the savage dwarves killed them all.
textByHash.526cffd46bfb651345e5f931358716979d41e1fb: I think she said her name was Madam Sikaro.
textByHash.7adca4f3306e5efe248bc0a5628640b4da0ed2ba: Her venom is priceless and it would aid me greatly in my research.
textByHash.a02da8d0fae6a53ecc78e3b622185d23a742f5ca: It will not be easy, but if I can get her when she's wounded in her lair, it should be a fairer fight.
textByHash.a511b3a37f70d5109821ff3d0c7af34f561777b8: I'm out here on a mission, do you think I chose to hang around these lowlifes?
textByHash.b72ad81f5b04411db693423b39583f5327d83927: Feel free to come back when you do.
textByHash.bd09874f50e9ba236928dc32ff4004278c7d6d57: I've tried to put it off for as long as I could, but this is the final component needed for my research.
textByHash.c8c06ff1ea414e384432fb7ca588273f11b1e1cd: She is the last one left and I must have a sample of her venom.
textByHash.d2c2edde0cbb16aa035ae2c6390c8dbbc3ec9c11: She only returns there to lick her wounds and rest, I need to be patient.
textByHash.d2f0c7e6bdb0f5e73409ffe5b00e99044f46dcc1: I would go out and fight her now, but I must admit, I am also a little scared. I've never been in a fight before.
textByHash.d77970a6cfbea375f14a13eff6d2cb7c517de2f3: Andros Mai is a very... Devoted man. If you can see past that, he may be able to help you.
textByHash.db1fa3d67b27a1e076ce3a43355098932edda891: What I want with the specimen however, is none of your business!
textByHash.db96dc2f772c94e838bfd421c1391ba2a0e1d6b9: It is said his skull can power a certain Zamorakian weapon.
textByHash.e121c878794907ca32f0f925193b376cf31a316f: Ah, but they contain no more venom. That is disappointing.
textByHash.e3432f09f8db232acb51de937b1f4e6fc919c130: Thanks for your words of confidence...
textByHash.e5479608a92afb56b1a422e29ea14b1de46fa664: Downstairs there's a strange looking person. I don't know what that item is, but if anyone would, I reckon she would.
textByHash.e74e87b86ea1c857d8d9873f860c974394091ef1: I've seen that Derse Venator guy over there handle similar items. Perhaps he knows more.
textByHash.f33eec3d6ffcd96dace091ebfb4c525240029180: A skilled crafter can combine the two. If you wish, I could do it for you... For a price, that is.
